explanation: The property states that globally, whenever the system is in PSV Mode and a new breathing cycle begins, the inspiration phase must also start at that exact moment. This directly captures the requirement that the breath cycle in PSV mode shall start with the inspiration phase.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'PSVMode' and a 'breathingCycleStart' event occurs, it must immediately be accompanied by the 'inspiratoryPhaseStart' event. This ensures that every new breath cycle initiated in PSV mode begins with the inspiration phase.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'PSV Mode' and a 'breathing cycle starts', it must be immediately followed by the 'inspiratory phase starting'. This directly translates the requirement that in PSV mode, the breath cycle initiates with inspiration.

The LTL property states that globally (G), whenever the system is in PSV Mode (PSVMode) AND a breathing cycle starts (breathingCycleStart), it must be true that the inspiratory phase starts (inspiratoryPhaseStart) at the same moment. This captures the requirement that in PSV Mode, every breath cycle initiates directly with the inspiration phase.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in PSV mode and a breathing cycle starts, then the inspiratory phase must also start at the same time. This captures the requirement that the breath cycle, when in PSV mode, initiates directly with the inspiration phase.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in PSV mode and a breathing cycle starts, the inspiratory phase must also start at that very moment. This ensures that the breath cycle always initiates with the inspiration phase when the PSV mode is active.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'PSV Mode' and a 'breathing cycle starts', it must be immediately accompanied by the 'inspiratory phase' being active. This captures the requirement that the breath cycle, when initiated in PSV mode, commences with the inspiration phase.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in PSV mode and a new breathing cycle begins, the inspiratory phase must also start at that exact moment. This ensures that breathing cycles in PSV mode are always initiated by inspiration.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in PSV Mode (bool_exp1) AND a breathing cycle starts (bool_exp2), then the inspiratory phase must start (bool_exp3) at the same time. This directly captures the requirement that the breath cycle, when in PSV Mode, shall start with the inspiration phase.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in PSV mode and a breathing cycle begins (bool_exp1), it must immediately be followed by the start of the inspiratory phase (bool_exp3). This ensures that every breath cycle in PSV mode correctly initiates with inspiration.
